sections.text: The Magician symbolizes deity, skill, self-consciousness, and an active lifestyle. Ruling Planet:MercuryElement:AirNumber:1 as symbol for unity (male) Cards Page
Self-realization, a strong will, the energy to have one’s way
Activity, power of life, impulse, energy
Aggressively, egoism, the abuse of power
Mercury, communication, fun, easy communication with all possible forms of communication, flexibility, sharpness, genius
Brilliant capabilities are available to share with other people. It is an important task to find or create the right environment for your activity.
How talented are you? In which areas can your talent be found? In what ways, in what environment can you pass this on and share it with others?
Visualize your ideal location for your activity and write it down.
The full expression of my creative power is filled with me and makes me happy and satisfied.
My life is everything I make it.
